rules.name: Legality & Ethical Compliance
rules.description: The business concept must represent a legal, ethical, and safe enterprise under Philippine law. No scams, unregistered schemes, or deceptive trade practices.
rules.verification: Check that the product and business type do not violate local or national laws.

rules.name: Gross Margin Test
rules.description: The selling price per unit must be strictly greater than the unit cost of goods sold (COGS).

rules.name: Capital Reconciliation Test
rules.description: The sum of all startup equipment, inventory, licenses, and initial working capital reserve must match the declared total capital.
rules.verification: Sum of Startup Costs + Cash Reserve = Declared Total Capital.

criteria.excellent: 31-35 pts. Pricing and COGS are highly realistic. Startup budget contains a healthy cash/working capital reserve (at least 1-2 months of OPEX). Monthly sales relate logically to daily capacity.
criteria.satisfactory: 25-30 pts. Math is correct, margins are healthy. Cash reserve is low (less than 1 month of OPEX). Projections are slightly optimistic but mathematically sound.
criteria.needs_improvement: 18-24 pts. Calculations contain minor errors. OPEX estimates are missing key elements (utilities, benefits). Cash reserve is practically non-existent.
criteria.unacceptable: 0-17 pts. Major mathematical errors. Projections are wildly unrealistic.

criteria.excellent: 22-25 pts. Proposed location has a specific address corresponding to the target demographic. Rent is realistic. Equipment list is comprehensive and matches the projected volume.
criteria.satisfactory: 18-21 pts. Location is realistic but rent or leasehold estimates are slightly low. Equipment is functional, minor tools might be underbudgeted.
criteria.needs_improvement: 13-17 pts. Location is vague or mismatched with target market. Critical production equipment is missing.
criteria.unacceptable: 0-12 pts. Location is omitted or unviable. Equipment list is insufficient to produce the product.

criteria.excellent: 22-25 pts. Target market is clearly defined (age, income, geography). Promotional strategies utilize a realistic mix of digital and physical channels with matched budgets.
criteria.satisfactory: 18-21 pts. Target market is defined but too broad. Promotional strategies are standard ('just post on Facebook') without unique local allocations.
criteria.needs_improvement: 13-17 pts. Target market is poorly defined. Marketing ideas are generic, and promotional activities do not align with the budget.
criteria.unacceptable: 0-12 pts. No clear marketing/promotional plan, or relies on wildly unrealistic assumptions.

criteria.excellent: 13-15 pts. Mission and Vision statements are clear, professional, and directly reflected in the product offering. Formatting is clean and consistent.
criteria.satisfactory: 10-12 pts. Mission and Vision are standard but functional. Document is complete with minor formatting or spelling errors.
criteria.needs_improvement: 7-9 pts. Mission, Vision, and product description lack cohesion (e.g., mission states healthy food but the menu is deep-fried junk food). Disorganized.
criteria.unacceptable: 0-6 pts. Key qualitative sections are missing, copy-pasted, or completely unaligned.

performance_matrix.recommendation: Strong, well-designed study with realistic financial buffers. Ready for execution.
Mathematically sound and logical. Minor adjustments (such as increasing working capital or refining marketing) recommended.
Requires major revisions to either the operational or financial section before receiving a passing grade.
Serious structural, operational, or financial issues requiring a complete rewrite or concept pivot.

exemplars.name: The Dory House Co. (Dory-Yaki)
exemplars.location: Unit 1B #17 G. Lazaro St., Dalandanan, Valenzuela City
exemplars.promotional_strategy: Multi-channel (FB, IG, TikTok), local micro-influencer partnerships, flyers, customer loyalty cards, back-to-school discounts.

exemplars.name: Empinoy
exemplars.type: Food Service Quick-Service Food Stall (Empanada Specialty)
exemplars.location: 1358 Que Grande Street, Ugong, Valenzuela City
exemplars.promotional_strategy: Daily/weekly social media ads, direct customer contact via SMS, physical product sampling, custom monthly marketing themes.
